reviews.review_description: Hi Thirdverse, I have been playing your game since December 25, 2021. I hope you have plans for an update of the Sword of Gargantua in the future of 2025. I like it. It reminds me of anime called Sword Art online. Again, I l8ke  your game, and I hope I can see Sword of gargantua raise again.

Hey thirdverse,

 I've been playing your game for a long time and I was sad that you did shut down the server, but you did relaunch it, I'm glad you did. Your game is amazing and there's no other game like it. Swords of Gargantua is a good game and I think there is still so much potential this game has. New characters (Npc's) or customizable character's would be a great idea. More story should be added, there's so much potential to a storyline for this game. The game is a bit wonky, but doesn't really effect gameplay too much. But as i said many times before your game is really fun, I don't know people got really mad at the game shutting down the server's or why people got so mad when they bought it when it said right in front of them that it was out of service. It was a good game and they should've appreciated it.

Sincerely, Sirmeatshield

This is a great game overall, I will say it may be worth more like 4 starts instead of 5 (it has its flaws) but, again, it is still a good game.

The problem is the company ran out of money about a year ago and had to shut down the game completely, or so they thought. Over the course of a few months they mustered up enough money to get the game up and running again.

However, the long time players didn’t like that the game shut down out of seemingly nowhere: the biggest problem being that (since it is being sold through oculus) none of those players were able to get a refund because they did not meet the oculus (or meta) store requirements.

So yeah; it’s a good game, and it has its flaws. 
But I do not believe the company could have done much to avoid the hate, it seems they were backed into a financial corner.

I like it level threw the layers of dungeons and become the most powerful you can and if you die start all over again endless hours of sword fighting fun! Roleplay at your extent throw 4 boomerangs in a order and if you get good at it you will look like a deadly mage lol

reviews.review_title: just wanted more people to play
reviews.review_description: great game but i wish it wasn't  *******  dead
I have drift and it makes it really hard to play with turning I started crying because I got motion sickness
Do we have no shame? More like "does Thirdverse have no shame?" LMAO 🤡
I like how you can gain weapons over time and upgrade yourself plus the combat it really fun.

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for the great score! Glad you are having fun and enjoying the combat :)

reviews.review_description: I have been playing this for about a week and a half now and I was lvl 17 and for no reason everything I had is gone I had lvl 3 plus 4 swords and everything is just gone wth

developer_response.body: We apologize for the trouble. The team is now looking into this and any further feedback would be appreciated. If you could write an email to cs@thirdverse.co.jp and share more details with us, we would be glad to help you out.

reviews.review_description: I was super excited to play this game. I read reviews, the cut scene in the beginning was awesome but the game is not fun at all. I get tired of replaying the same levels over and over again. The blocking and parry system is flawed, too many times have I tried blocking a side swing just to see their sword go straight through mine. Graphics are not that great but they weren't expected to be perfect. Definitely wouldn't recommend this game to anybody, wish there was a trial so I didnt have to buy it.

developer_response.body: Hello, we always do our best to deliver the best quality possible so we are sorry to hear that your experience with the game wasn't good. We suggest trying the Adventure multiplayer mode and hope you will give the game a second chance.

reviews.review_description: Terrible graphics and so glitchy, we had to stop playing.

developer_response.body: hello, very sorry to hear that your experience with the game was not enjoyable. If you want to share more feedback about your experience, please reach out to cs@thirdverse.co.jp or through our official Discord https://discord.gg/mKSvKZe

reviews.review_description: The game lags bad when I move around especially when I'm holding two swords. The enemies sometimes go through your blocking

developer_response.body: Very sorry to read your experience of Gargantua was unsatisfactory. The delay in two-handed sword is to simulate the heaviness of 2-handed swords. Regarding the blocking issue, it should be fixed after a recent update our team made to improve the system and make parrying and blocking easier to perform.

reviews.review_description: Avoid at all cost. If you want a good sword melee game, move along.

This is a very good demo of sword fighting mechanics, but I'd struggle calling it a game. All the levels are basically hacking at very similar monsters, in the same bland room. No exploration, no real advancement, level 1 is pretty much the same as all the rest.  Neat demo, but not a game, in my assessment.

I have just retired two past systems. This is what I have been waiting for as a swords game/trainer/creative release..with its selective targeting on the feudal era zombies...retired, ok mayb resting. Looking for 10K first;)
Anyway an awesome game Thank you and much respect to the creators!! Btw, it was good to get a couple weeks down in vr first for the newvrist. Still buy either way no regrets and I would buy the system for this game.
Bought it...downloaded it...Had to restart system since it tried to mess up the tracking system...loaded past startup icon...wont connect to network...requesting refund

developer_response.body: Hi Zoobot, very sorry to hear that you are having issues. Could you reach out to us at cs@yomune.co and we can find a resolution. Thanks - Yomuneco Team

reviews.review_description: Having a bit of trouble even starting the game on my Quest. Keeps telling me Communication Error, and I’ve uninstalled the game, restarted my Quest and router. Any help would be appreciated.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that you are having issues connecting. Could you send us an email at info@yomune.co? We can see if we can resolve the communication error.

reviews.review_description: Swords of Gargantua is about you, climbing a tower, swordfighting enemies on the way up roughly 100 floors, to fight a big guy at the end. That's all, and it's amazing every time. Level up your character and unlock new weapons as you play and maybe eventually defeat Gargantua.

developer_response.body: Appreciate the great score and the kind review! We hope you will continue to support the game with the same enthusiasm in the future too :)

reviews.review_title: Really neat game. Worth the price.
reviews.review_description:
The developers really crafted something cool here. Love the concept of advancing through levels as rounds like a arcade game. And being able to play COOP with random people or friends is just plain fun. The weapons are all unique and each one has its perks and down sides. CROSSPLAY is a HUUUGE plus. More games need this. Owning HTC VIVE and Oculus Quest i can play with friends.

I really hope the developers dont stop making this game better. Oh my gosh could this thing be like the best game ever. Dont kill this baby, I hope it matures and grows old!

The game does have some issues like the already mentioned audio cutting in and out randomly, sometimes you lose ability to pick up items, some crashes which even actually shut down the oculus itself. And the graphics are blurry at any distance and really pixelated but closer up things look well. Hope the developers can nail these issues down.  Otherwise this would be a 5/5 game.

developer_response.body:
Many thanks for the super-thoughtful review. We always do our best to provide the best experience possible to our users :) 

Regarding the audio issue it was resolved some time ago after an update released by Oculus. You should be able to hear your teammates clear and sound now. The crashing issue has also been resolved recently, make sure to check out the latest game update!
Regarding the other issues, we have some other updates planned down the line, if you want to learn more feel free to join our Discord https://discord.gg/mKSvKZe

reviews.review_title: Fun but lacks enemy and arena variety
reviews.review_description: I have made it up to room 70ish but still only encounter the same 4 enemies. This game is fun initially but lacks enemy and arena variety. If the developers could address this it'd make a big difference. £19 for 4 enemies feels a bit steep!
